insight: Python dataclass中使用了field(default_factory=...)但忘记导入field是常见错误。execution.py就是一个例子。审查plan时需要检查所有dataclass的import完整性。

If frontend/.env.local changes VITE_API_TARGET, an already-running Vite dev server keeps proxying to the old backend until it is restarted. In this repo that can surface as /api/accounts and /api/login 404s while legacy /api/config routes still work against the stale target.

In AppLayout column flex shells, a responsive header that is allowed to shrink can visually overlap the first page card even when media queries wrap correctly; pin the header with flex-shrink: 0 before chasing page-level layout bugs.
BUFF 登录抓取不能只把 session 和 csrf_token 存在当成已登录，必须再用 get_user_info 验证 cookie 代表真实登录身份；否则会把访客或失效态误报成抓取成功，并连带让自动同步展示误导性的失败结果。
